name: badminton-tournament-scheduler
description: Badminton Tournament Scheduler - Optimized for Netlify

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run minify:html && npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js && npm run copy
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist dist/css dist/js
scripts.minify:css: for file in css/*.css; do cleancss -o dist/$file $file; done
scripts.minify:js: for file in js/*.js; do terser $file -o dist/$file -c -m; done
scripts.copy: cp _headers dist/_headers && cp netlify.toml dist/netlify.toml && cp README.md dist/README.md 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.analyze: echo 'Original size:' && du -sh . && echo 'Optimized size:' && du -sh dist

author: Phuc C. Nguyen
